/nix/store/3awwcrqv9lpcq553zs2zb7y0mr5niswd-clang-wrapper-19.1.7/bin/clang++ -fprofile-instr-generate -fcoverage-mapping -g -fprofile-instr-generate -fsanitize=address -fsanitize=undefined -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/bench_string.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/bench_string.dir/tests/benchs/bench_string.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bench_string.dir/cxb/cxb.cpp.o -o bench_string  deps/Catch2/src/libCatch2Maind.a deps/Catch2/src/libCatch2d.a
